Video.summary: Martha prepares pot-au-feu, a hearty French one-pot meal of meat and vegetables.
Video.title: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Image.alt: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn all about the most popular and sought after houseplants, topiaries and begonias and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Succulents are known for their interesting textures. Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: One of the joys of gardening is having beautiful color all year. Bulbs and tubers are at the center of the show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha is in the test kitchen with English chef, restaurateur, and author Jamie Oliver, and they're cooking up a mouth-watering menu of dishes that are easy to make.
Video.title: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver

Image.alt: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver
One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver
One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver

Video.summary: Martha and her friend Monica create a Vietnamese feast.
Video.title: Vietnamese Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha shares mouthwatering bake sale-inspired recipes: peanut butter and jelly bars, decadent brownies with a surprise ingredient, and pecan bars with toffee topping
Video.title: Bar Cookies

Video.summary: Eat your vegetables! Martha prepares: spring peas with mint, brown-sugared carrots, sauteed broccoli rabe, roasted acorn squash, corn on the cob, and lemony kale salad
Video.title: Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha serves up a delicious chicken dinner with fresh ingredients from her greenhouse; joined by her good friend Kevin Sharkey, they celebrate the perfect meal for a taste of home-cooked goodness.
Video.title: Perfect Chicken Dinner

Video.summary: Martha shares everything you need to create extraordinary holiday breads: Italian panettone, German stollen, and Greek Easter bread (studded with red eggs)
Video.title: Holiday Breads

Video.summary: Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the last flowers of spring. Everything you need to know about hostas. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill; then back to her home in Bedford for a garden club tour.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha serves up delicious homemade pizzas alongside friends and pizza chefs Christian Petroni and Dean Medico; featuring classic pizzas, signature sauces, and more.
Video.title: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Image.alt: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Video.summary: Martha starts off brunch with a citrus cocktail Mary's knees; Chef Ignacio Mattos joins and makes an omelette with caviar and creme fraiche; Martha makes an endive salad; Martha makes waffles.
Video.title: Brunch Favorites

Video.summary: Martha journeys through her local area in search of the ultimate fresh-baked croissants and sourdough bread; learning about homemade bread and pastries.
Video.title: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread

Image.alt: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread
How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread
How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread

Video.summary: Martha and her niece Sophie visit their favorite tea shop, Arogya, in Westport, Conn., to discover the do's and don'ts of making tea; they return to Martha's kitchen to create dishes with tea.
Video.title: Martha Throws a Tea Party

Video.summary: Steaming is one of the fastest and healthiest ways to cook. Martha shows how to cook in parchment paper, clean and steam mussels, and use a bamboo steamer to prepare salmon and peas
Video.title: Steaming

Video.summary: Roasting is an adaptable technique that works well for meat, fish, chicken, and vegetables. Martha prepares roast chicken, beef tenderloin, and autumn vegetable salad
Video.title: Roasting

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates healthful and versatile poached chicken breasts. She also shares recipes and techniques for poaching salmon and poaching eggs
Video.title: Poaching

Video.summary: A beautifully cooked roast makes a grand centerpiece for any dinner. Martha shares techniques for prime rib roast, crown roast of pork, and stuffed turkey breast
Video.title: Perfect Roast

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering; how to start trees from seedlings. Plus, Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Martha spotlights conifers, the cone-bearing evergreen trees. Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha shares four favorite breakfast-for-a-crowd recipes: a puffy Dutch baby pancake, oven-baked French toast, pea and ham quiche, and fontina, speck, and onion strata
Video.title: Breakfast

Video.summary: Easter Brunch, Tying Daffodils, Colorful Easter Dyeing, Easter Baskets, Easter Egg Hunt
Video.title: Easter Brunch, Easter Baskets, Egg Hunt

Image.alt: Easter Brunch, Easter Baskets, Egg Hunt
Easter Brunch, Easter Baskets, Egg Hunt
Easter Brunch, Easter Baskets, Egg Hunt

Video.summary: Hydrangeas, Lobster and Corn Dinner, Mossy Pots, May Wine
Video.title: Hydrangeas, Lobster Dinner, May Wine

Video.summary: Easter: Petit Fours, Making Easter Baskets, Cookie of the Week: Cookie Tree, Easter Egg Hunt
Video.title: Easter Petit Fours, Baskets, Easter Egg Hunt

Image.alt: Easter Petit Fours, Baskets, Easter Egg Hunt
Easter Petit Fours, Baskets, Easter Egg Hunt
Easter Petit Fours, Baskets, Easter Egg Hunt

Video.summary: Easter Feast: Ham 101, Chocolate Eggs and Nests, Decorating Easter Cookies
Video.title: Ham 101, Chocolate Eggs and Nests

Video.summary: 122nd Annual Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show in New York City (Field Trip)
Video.title: 122nd Annual Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show

Image.alt: 122nd Annual Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show
122nd Annual Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show
122nd Annual Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show

Video.summary: Martha's Passionate Staff, Behind the Scenes at Martha's Offices, Dripped-On Eggs, Lemon Fusilli, Garden Loppers 101, Becoming a Dog Show Winner, Braised Capon with Pearl Onions, Passover Table
Video.title: Behind the Scenes, Lemon Fusilli

Video.summary: All about eggs! Martha shares her methods for preparing eggs, any style: soft- and hard-boiled eggs, fried eggs, scrambled eggs, omelet, and frittata
Video.title: Eggs

Video.summary: Martha makes three easy, classic sauces: hollandaise, bechamel, beurre blanc, and marinara
Video.title: Sauces

Video.summary: Martha shares techniques for three homemade stocks: chicken (including a pressure-cooker version), beef, and vegetable. Plus, cooking and storage tips
Video.title: Stocks

Video.summary: Butcher Evan Lobel joins Martha for a master class on meat. Learn how to choose and prepare the best cuts of meat to save you money
Video.title: Butchering

Video.summary: Starting with a perfect pot of fluffy white rice, Martha demonstrates her techniques for a flavorful pilaf and a delicious Thai-style fried rice
Video.title: Rice

Video.summary: Homemade dressings don't compare to store-bought. Martha shows you how easy it is to make your own: vinaigrette, creamy blue cheese dressing, homemade mayonnaise, and aioli
Video.title: Dressings and Emulsions

Video.summary: With little hands-on time and no special equipment, braising produces hearty, flavorful dishes. Martha shares recipes for pot roast, braised cabbage, and pulled pork shoulder
Video.title: Braising

Video.summary: Fried foods should be golden brown and never greasy. Martha deep-fries and pan-fries to perfection: French fries, pan-fried chicken, and Japanese tempura vegetables
Video.title: Frying

Video.summary: Pan-searing means browning food over high heat to develop a crust and lock in juiciness. Martha prepares scallops, salmon fillets, steak with mustard cream sauce, duck breasts
Video.title: Pan Searing

Video.summary: Martha creates four of her easy-to-prepare old-fashioned fruit dessert favorites: peach cobbler, blueberry crisp, blackberry buckle, and pear brown betty
Video.title: Old-Fashioned Fruit Desserts

Video.summary: Martha presents how to make bread pudding, chocolate pots de creme (an old-fashioned French custard), traditional steamed cranberry pudding, and light lemon pudding cakes
Video.title: Puddings

Video.summary: Martha shows you everything you need to know about pie baking; plus, three of her favorite recipes: peach crumble pie, classic key lime pie, and coconut cream pie
Video.title: Pies

Video.summary: Nutley Hall of Fame: Chilean Chicken Stew, Saint Bernard 101, Martha Stewart's Induction in the Nutley Hall of Fame Event (Field Trip), Rice and Black Beans, Corn Light Bread, Winter Flowers
Video.title: Nutley Hall of Fame

Video.summary: Celebrating Easter: Lamb Cake, Easter Eggs, Buffet
Video.title: Easter Lamb Cake, Easter Eggs

Video.summary: Begonias, Edge Trimmer Good Thing, Ground Covers, Moss Container Good Thing, Hot Fudge Good Thing
Video.title: Begonias, Ground Covers, Hot Fudge
